references.text: Holttum, RE. 1991. Tectaria group. Flora Malesiana series 2, 2: 1-132
Zhou, X-M & L-B Zhang. 2019. A monograph of the fern genus Pteridrys (Pteridryaceae). Systematic Botany 44 (2019) 243-273.

genera.last_edited: Last edited by Julie F. Barcelona, 6 February 2022

species.citation: (Fée) C.Chr. & Ching , Bull. Fan Mem. Inst. Biol. 5 (1934) 139 ; Holttum, Fl. Males., 2nd Ser. 2 (1991) 7; Zhou & Zhang, Syst. Bot. 44 (2019) 253; ≡ Aspidium microthecium Fée , Mém. Foug., 10. Ic. Esp. Nouv. (1865) 37; Type: Cuming 13 (RB, holo; BM, E, K, L, P, US, iso), Luzon: 1-Jan-1856.
species.distribution: Endemic to the Philippines. BOHOL (photos), CAMIGUIN, CATANDUANES, LUZON: Batangas, Laguna, Quezon, MINDANAO: Agusan del Norte, Cotabato, Davao Oriental, Davao del Norte, Davao del Sur, Lanao del Sur, Surigao del Norte, Zamboanga, Zamboanga del Sur, MINDORO, NEGROS, PALAWAN, SAMAR.

species.citation: (Willd.) C.Chr. & Ching , Bull. Fan Mem. Inst. Biol. 5 (1934) 131 ; Holttum, Fl. Males., 2nd Ser. 2 (1991) 5; Zhou & Zhang, Syst. Bot. 44 (2019) 247; ≡ Aspidium syrmaticum Willd. , Sp. Pl., 4th Ed. 5 (1810) 237; Type: not from the Philippines. = Polypodium oxyodon Baker , J. Bot. 17 (1879) 66; Type: Burbidge 27 (K, lecto; K, isolecto), Sulu Archipelago. = Dryopteris syrmatica var. petiolosa Christ , PJS 2c (1907) 210; Type: Copeland 928 (P, holo), Mindanao: Dist. of Davao, 1-Ap-1904.
species.distribution: Java, Malaysia, Philippines, Thailand. BALABAC, LEYTE, LUZON: Batangas, Laguna, Nueva Vizcaya, Rizal, Sorsogon, MINDANAO: Cotabato, Davao, Davao Oriental, Davao del Sur, Lanao del Sur, South Cotabato, Zamboanga, Zamboanga del Sur, MINDORO (photos), PALAWAN, SULU ARCHIPELAGO.
